metadata.track_name: 将 domain-ai 显式宿主推进为默认消费入口
metadata.goal: 让 `@cell/domain-ai-contract` / `@cell/domain-ai-logic` 成为 AI-specific contract/logic 的默认消费入口。

phase.name: Consumer Ownership Freeze
phase.goal: 冻结哪些 consumer 应优先切到 domain-ai host。

task.name: 定义 consumer cutover ownership 表
task.description: 明确哪些 composer/mod/shell/test 调用方应切到 `domain-ai-*`。

phase.name: Consumer Cutover
phase.goal: 完成第一批默认消费入口切换。

task.name: 切换 domain-ai contract/logic consumer
task.description: 调整 composer/mod/shell/test 入口优先消费 `@cell/domain-ai-contract` / `@cell/domain-ai-logic`。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: 第一批 consumer 已切换

phase.name: Focused Verification
phase.goal: 验证默认消费入口与 ownership 不回归。

task.name: 运行 domain-ai host focused tests
task.description: 覆盖 package surface、runtime composer、shell adoption 等关键面。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: domain-ai host 成为默认入口
